query: I need to organize a 3-day trip for a group of 3, departing from Asheville and arriving in Minneapolis. We will be traveling from March 7th to March 9th, 2022, with a total budget of $2,300. We require accommodations that allow pets and provide entire rooms. Regarding meals, our group enjoys a variety of cuisines, including Indian, Chinese, Mediterranean, and American.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Asheville to Minneapolis, duration: 15 hours 47 mins, distance: 1,711 km, cost: 85
plan.attraction: Minneapolis Sculpture Garden;Minnehaha Falls;Mill City Museum;
plan.lunch: The Cafe (Indian, Mediterranean, Desserts, Seafood), Minneapolis
plan.dinner: Monkeypod Kitchen by Merriman (Desserts, Pizza, Bakery, Fast Food, Indian, Mediterranean), Minneapolis
plan.accommodation: Light-filled Apartment in great area, close 2 all! (Entire home/apt), Minneapolis

plan.breakfast: Balbeer's Kitchen & Bar (Tea, Chinese, Bakery), Minneapolis
plan.attraction: Minneapolis Institute of Art;Weisman Art Museum;Gold Medal Park;
plan.lunch: Wok In The Clouds (Pizza, Seafood), Minneapolis
plan.dinner: Agent Jack's Bar (Desserts, Tea, Bakery, Chinese, Seafood), Minneapolis
plan.accommodation: Light-filled Apartment in great area, close 2 all! (Entire home/apt), Minneapolis
